---
title: "Storyboards"
---

In this section, we will present the storyboards that guide the user experience of our visual analytics tool.

Our storyboards will illustrate how users can interact with the visualizations to gain insights into the music knowledge graph.

## User Scenario: Identifying a Breakout Star

The following storyboard outlines how a music historian interacts with our dashboard to discover the next generation of Oceanus Folk artists.

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![**Step 1:** The user filters the timeline to post-2030.](images/step1.png)

![**Step 2:** The dashboard updates, and the user sorts by Notable Works.](images/step2.png)

![**Step 3:** The user selects 'Min Qin' to isolate her trajectory.](images/step3.png)

![**Step 4:** Hovering reveals the tooltip detailing her specific momentum metrics.](images/step4.png)
:::
